2021 సంవత్సరం పూర్తి సమయంలో నమోదు చేయబడిన అన్ని ఆలోపతిక బయటి రోగుల హాజరు మొత్తం పరిమాణం ఆధారంగా, ఉపజిల్లాలు మరియు వాటి ప్రాంతాల రకాలను అత్యధికం నుండి ప్రారంభించి ర్యాంక్ చేయండి.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA, SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA ORDER BY SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    ds.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME,
    ds.TYPE_OF_AREA,
    SUM(fos.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) AS total_attendance,
    RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(fos.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) DESC) AS rank
FROM FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES fos
JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT ds ON fos.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = ds.SUB_DISTRICT_ID
JOIN DIM_MONTH dm ON fos.MONTH_ID = dm.MONTH_ID
JOIN DIM_YEAR dy ON dm.YEAR_ID = dy.YEAR_ID
WHERE dy.YEAR_VALUE = 2021
GROUP BY ds.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, ds.TYPE_OF_AREA
ORDER BY rank;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    ds.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME,
    ds.TYPE_OF_AREA,
    SUM(fos.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) AS total_attendance,
    RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(fos.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) DESC) AS rank
FROM FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES fos
JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT ds ON fos.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = ds.SUB_DISTRICT_ID
JOIN DIM_MONTH dm ON fos.MONTH_ID = dm.MONTH_ID
JOIN DIM_YEAR dy ON dm.YEAR_ID = dy.YEAR_ID
WHERE dy.YEAR_VALUE = 2021
GROUP BY ds.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, ds.TYPE_OF_AREA
ORDER BY rank;

    sd.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME,
    sd.TYPE_OF_AREA,
    SUM(cia.CHILDREN_MORE_THAN_10_YEARS_TT10_TD10 + cia.CHILDREN_MORE_THAN_16_YEARS_TT16_TD16) AS TOTAL_VACCINES
FROM FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ADOLESCENT cia
JOIN DIM_MONTH m ON cia.MONTH_ID = m.MONTH_ID
